_comment: Sample .rift/secrets.json repo manifest. See docs/secrets.md. This file declares WHICH secrets this box wants and WHERE they land; it never names a source. Sources live in your private ~/.config/rift/secrets.json.

secrets.description: AWS credentials, brokered into `rift run` (no file left on the box).
GitHub token for gh / git-over-HTTPS on the box.
A project-specific token delivered as an environment variable.
